character_identity_card: CAESAR IDENTITY (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): young boy, roughly 6 years old, head ~1/3 of body height (child proportions). Face: perfectly circular, 100% pure white (#FFFFFF), flat, no shading, no skin tone. Features: exactly 2 small black dot eyes symmetrical, 2 thin short black eyebrow strokes above, 1 short horizontal black mouth line. NO nose. NO cheeks. NO mouth opening. Hair: dark chocolate brown (#4A2B1A), short bowl-cut with straight horizontal bangs covering the forehead down to the eyebrows, short around the ears. Body: cream/ivory short-sleeve tunic reaching mid-thigh, with a gold-and-purple embroidered band (2cm wide) at the neckline and shoulder seam. A single diagonal dark sienna red (#A0522D) sash draped from the LEFT shoulder across to the right hip. Legs bare below the tunic, simple brown leather sandals. Hands: pure white MITTEN shapes, no finger detail visible. Pose should vary per scene but IDENTITY IS IMMUTABLE across every frame.
character_block: The central subject is Caesar (see identity card above — DO NOT deviate). ABSOLUTE RULE FOR OTHER HUMANS IN THE SCENE: EVERY other human character — women, men, elderly, senators, soldiers, servants, children, merchants, attendants, crowd members — MUST share Caesar's face style exactly: pure WHITE ROUND FEATURELESS FACE with only tiny black dot eyes, thin eyebrow strokes, and minimal straight mouth line. NO realistic human faces, NO skin tones, NO noses, NO cheeks, NO wrinkles, NO visible teeth. Hands always pure white mitten shapes. Secondary characters differ ONLY by: hair (black/grey/brown flat shapes; optional beards/moustaches as black shapes attached to the white face), body build, and clothing color (varied tunics, togas with purple borders, armor, stolae). The WHITE ROUND FACE is non-negotiable on every humanoid in the frame.
global_style_card: STYLE (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): children's picture book / storytime YouTube animation. Pure 2D cel-shading — NO 3D render, NO photorealism, NO anime. Outlines: uniform, bold black, ~3-5px thickness everywhere (characters AND props AND architecture). Colors: flat fills with at most 2-3 tonal shades per object (no smooth gradients on faces or bodies). Palette dominant: warm amber / terracotta / cream / muted purple / dark chocolate / ivory. Lighting: soft warm ambient, very gentle directional, NO harsh shadows on characters, NO rim light on faces. Backgrounds may have light directional shadow for depth but characters stay flat. Aspect ratio: 16:9 cinematic. Composition: respects the scene's framing field; environment dominates, characters small.
style_block: clean 2D cel-shading storytime YouTube animation style, bold thick black outlines, flat simple colors, warm natural lighting, ancient Rome aesthetic, cinematic composition, 16:9
negative_prompt: realistic human faces, human skin tones on faces, realistic facial features, detailed cheeks, wrinkled realistic faces, detailed eyes, detailed noses, visible teeth, detailed skin texture, 3D rendering, photorealistic, detailed fingers, gradient shading on skin, heavy shadows on face, anime style, text, watermark, characters with normal human faces, mix of art styles, some characters realistic some cartoon, inconsistent character appearance, Caesar with different hair, Caesar with different tunic color
